name: @prune/repo-proof
description: f20 repo-proof — evidence-gated, repo-local outcome proof. Mines SWE-bench-style task candidates from a repository's own git history (human-curated prompts, never fabricated), verifies each task with the three-state protocol (base passes clean, fails with hidden tests, reference passes), runs the @prune/outcome-bench paired naive-vs-governed matrix under an explicit budget cap, and — only on a passing, Ed25519-attested proof — promotes TokenLens feature flags shadow→general for that repository, with the attestation hash as the auditable reason. CLI: prune-proof mine|verify|prove|promote|status.
